sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52966" key="kaminai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰμῑν-αῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52966.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">from a furnace</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τέφρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0343.tlg001:136" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ezek.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Exag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">136</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
